name: Apricot Angel Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt chocolate and butter over low heat, stirring constantly until all the chocolate is melted. Remove from heat; stir in brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla until blended. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir in the chocolate mixture.
3. Combine apricots, almonds, and coconut; stir half into the batter.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan. Sprinkle the remaining apricot mixture on top.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool.
